Six income streams — ranked by passivity, margin, and ceiling. The exact order to build them for a sustainable creator business.
Free Creator Economy Calculators for Every Platform

Kalkil provides free, instant earnings calculators for every major creator platform in 2026. Whether you're a YouTube creator trying to understand your CPM and RPM, an independent musician estimating Spotify royalties, a TikTok creator modeling Creator Rewards income, or an Instagram influencer figuring out your market rate — each tool gives you data-backed estimates with no sign-up required.

Every calculator is built on 2026 industry rate data and reflects the actual payment models used by each platform. The YouTube Money Calculator uses current CPM benchmarks across 10 content niches. The Spotify Royalty Calculator accounts for listener geography and Premium vs. free-tier audience splits. The TikTok Money Calculator models both Creator Rewards and the sponsorship income that represents 90%+ of serious TikTok earnings.

Pair any calculator with our free creator economy guides to understand the context behind every estimate — why certain niches earn more, how platform payment models actually work, and the strategies top creators use to maximize income.
What You Can Calculate
YouTube AdSense earnings by CPM, RPM, niche, and view count
YouTube CPM rates by country and advertiser category
TikTok sponsored post rates by follower tier and niche
Instagram influencer rates for feed posts, Reels, and Stories
Spotify royalties by stream count, listener geography, and distributor deal
Twitch income from subscriptions, Bits, and ad revenue
Podcast CPM advertising revenue by niche and download count
Patreon monthly income by patron count and tier pricing
OnlyFans earnings from subscriptions and PPV content
Influencer market rate across all platforms and content types
